structure: EXT-table pattern: orchestrator TRUNCATEs Ext_History_Cost, full-loads single-day CDC snapshot HistoryCosts_History_Costs, helper deletes target day from Fact_History_Cost and reinserts Ext.
dialect_notes: Both procs already DBSQL-clean (DateID via date_format; 'FROM Fact_History_Cost NOLOCK' parses as table alias; the V_row_count it feeds is dead). Autopoc clone only repoints the orchestrator's helper CALL to sp_fact_history_cost_autopoc.
gold_freshness: FRESH - gold max DateID 20260621 (yesterday), 918M rows. Migration 684M (historical backfill gap on older days) but latest-day slice is bit-exact.
